hero.alt: A beautiful portrait of a Narwhal in the wild
hero.caption: The Narwhal is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

baby.caption: Baby Narwhals must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.caption: While often solitary, some Narwhals interact with others of their species.
